max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto; background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-radius: 25px; box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), 0 0 100px rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.3); overflow: hidden; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .header { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #9333ea 0%, #7e22ce 100%); color: white; padding: 50px 40px; text-align: center; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.3); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .header::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; background: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='60' height='60' viewBox='0 0 60 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M54.627 0l.83.828-1.415 1.415L51.8 0h2.827zM5.373 0l-.83.828L5.96 2.243 8.2 0H5.374zM48.97 0l3.657 3.657-1.414 1.414L46.143 0h2.828zM11.03 0L7.372 3.657 8.787 5.07 13.857 0H11.03zm32.284 0L49.8 6.485 48.384 7.9l-7.9-7.9h2.83zM16.686 0L10.2 6.485 11.616 7.9l7.9-7.9h-2.83zm20.97 0l9.315 9.314-1.414 1.414L34.828 0h2.83zM22.344 0L13.03 9.314l1.414 1.414L25.172 0h-2.83zM32 0l12.142 12.142-1.414 1.414L30 .828 17.272 13.556 15.858 12.14 28 0zm0 3.657l10.485 10.485-1.414 1.414L32 6.485 22.929 15.556l-1.414-1.414L32 3.657z' fill='%239333ea' fill-opacity='0.05' fill-rule='evenodd'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); opacity: 0.3; } .logo { position: relative; z-index: 1; margin-bottom: 20px; } .logo-icon { width: 80px; height: 80px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e9d5ff 0%, #c084fc 100%); border-radius: 20px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 40px; margin-bottom: 15px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.4); animation: logoFloat 3s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes logoFloat { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px) rotate(0deg); } 50% { transform: translateY(-10px) rotate(2deg); } } .header h1 { font-size: 42px; margin-bottom: 12px; letter-spacing: 2px; font-weight: 800; text-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); position: relative; z-index: 1; } .header p { font-size: 16px; opacity: 0.95; color: #e9d5ff; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .form-container { padding: 50px; } .messages { margin-bottom: 25px; } .alert { padding: 14px 18px; border-radius: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; border-left: 4px solid; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); } .alert-success { background-color: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1); color: #6ee7b7; border-color: #10b981; } .alert-error { background-color: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.1); color: #fca5a5; border-color: #ef4444; } .section-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #c084fc 0%, #9333ea 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; margin: 40px 0 30px 0; padding-bottom: 20px; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.2); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .section-title i { font-size: 26px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #9333ea 0%, #c084fc 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.3)); } .section-title:first-of-type { margin-top: 0; } .form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 25px; margin-bottom: 25px; } .form-group { margin-bottom: 25px; position: relative; } .form-group.full-width { grid-column: 1 / -1; } .form-group label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; color: #c084fc; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; } .form-group label i { color: #9333ea; font-size: 14px; } .form-group label span { color: #ef4444; } .input-wrapper { position: relative; } .input-icon { position: absolute; left: 16px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: #9333ea; font-size: 16px; z-index: 1; } .form-group input, .form-group textarea { width: 100%; padding: 16px 16px 16px 45px; background: rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.8); border: 1.5px solid rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.3); border-radius: 12px; font-size: 14px; color: #e9d5ff; transition: all 0.3s ease; position: relative; } .form-group input[type="file"] { padding: 16px; } .form-group input::placeholder, .form-group textarea::placeholder { color: rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.4); } .form-group textarea { min-height: 120px; resize: vertical; padding-left: 16px !important; } .form-group input:focus, .form-group textarea:focus { outline: none; border-color: #9333ea; background: rgba(17, 17, 17, 1); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.2), 0 0 0 4px rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.1); transform: translateY(-2px); } .file-input-wrapper { position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: inline-block; width: 100%; } .file-input-wrapper input[type=file] { font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; } .submit-btn { width: 100%; padding: 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #9333ea 0%, #7e22ce 100%); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.4s ease; margin-top: 30px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.3); position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; } .submit-btn i { font-size: 20px; animation: iconPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes iconPulse { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.1); } } .submit-btn::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: -100%; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2), transparent); transition: left 0.5s; } .submit-btn:hover::before { left: 100%; } .submit-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.5); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #a855f7 0%, #9333ea 100%); } .submit-btn:active { transform: translateY(-1px); } .login-link { text-align: center; margin-top: 30px; padding-top: 25px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.2); color: #a78bfa; font-size: 15px; } .login-link a { color: #c084fc; text-decoration: none; font-weight: bold; transition: all 0.3s ease; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; display: inline-block; } .login-link a:hover { color: #e9d5ff; background: rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.1); } .info-box { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.1) 0%, rgba(107, 70, 193, 0.1) 100%); border-left: 4px solid #9333ea; padding: 20px; margin-bottom: 30px; border-radius: 12px; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.1); } .info-box p { margin: 0; color: #c084fc; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.8; display: flex; align-items: start; gap: 10px; } .info-box p i { color: #9333ea; margin-top: 3px; font-size: 16px; } .info-box strong { color: #e9d5ff; } .password-match { border-color: #10b981 !important; } .password-mismatch { border-color: #ef4444 !important; } .password-strength { font-size: 12px; margin-top: 8px; font-weight: 500; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .password-strength i { font-size: 14px; } .strength-weak { color: #ef4444; } .strength-medium { color: #f59e0b; } .strength-strong { color: #10b981; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .form-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .form-container { padding: 30px; } }

Become a Meeva Vendor

Join thousands of sellers and grow your business

{% if messages %}
{% for message in messages %}
{{ message }}
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}

Note: Your registration will be reviewed by our admin team. You'll be able to login once approved (usually within 24-48 hours).

Important: Remember your email and password - you'll need them to login after approval!
